# Pre-Tasks Readiness Checklist: Zed UX Flow

**Purpose**: Validate that the Zed UX Flow requirements are clear, bounded, and ready for `speckit-tasks` without introducing implementation drift.
**Created**: 2026-07-06
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` workflow based on feature context and requirements. It tests the requirements writing, not the implementation.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are the supported input paths fully specified and limited to direct text, authorized workspace files, and gated selection context? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-006]
- [x] CHK002 Are the out-of-scope boundaries complete for real providers, remote translation, API keys, marketplace publication, and automatic replacement? [Completeness, Spec §FR-010]
- [x] CHK003 Are Agent model-route privacy requirements specified separately from the local MCP translator boundary? [Completeness, Spec §FR-013]
- [x] CHK004 Are Agent tool-permission requirements specified for edit/write/delete/move/copy, terminal, fetch, and search tools? [Completeness, Spec §FR-014]
- [x] CHK005 Are evidence-format requirements specified for selection support and tool-input inspection? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK006 Is "low-friction" quantified with measurable review outcomes rather than left as a subjective UX adjective? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-011]
- [x] CHK007 Is selection support clearly defined as validated, unsupported, or deferred, with no wording that implies automatic support? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006, Spec §SC-003, Contract `ux-flow.md`]
- [x] CHK008 Is the term "local translator" consistently separated from "Agent model route" across spec, plan, contracts, and quickstart? [Clarity, Consistency]
- [x] CHK009 Are synthetic canary evidence requirements clear enough to avoid persisting real workspace text? [Clarity, Spec §FR-015, Contract `manual-validation.md`]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK010 Do the plan and UX contract preserve the same supported input boundaries as the functional requirements? [Consistency, Spec §FR-003-FR-006, Plan §Constraints, Contract `ux-flow.md`]
- [x] CHK011 Do the privacy requirements align with the constitution's offline-first provider boundary and log-redaction rules? [Consistency, Constitution §§II-IV, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-013, Spec §FR-015]
- [x] CHK012 Do no-mutation requirements align across success criteria, contracts, data model, and quickstart? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008, Spec §SC-010, Data Model `NoMutationEvidence`, Quickstart]
- [x] CHK013 Does the research record the Zed MCP extension deprecation risk without changing this feature's local-dev-extension scope? [Consistency, Research, Spec §FR-010]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK014 Can every success criterion be objectively reviewed with documented evidence? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001-SC-012]
- [x] CHK015 Are direct-text and workspace-file completion targets independently measurable? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-011]
- [x] CHK016 Are privacy and redaction success criteria measurable without requiring sensitive text in persistent notes? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005, Spec §SC-009, Spec §SC-012]
- [x] CHK017 Is the no-mutation acceptance signal measurable through file hashes, buffer notes, or equivalent evidence? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002, Data Model `NoMutationEvidence`]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK018 Are primary success flows covered for direct text and workspace-file translation? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §User Story 2]
- [x] CHK019 Are exception flows covered for setup failure, unsafe input, remote/provider denial, and redaction inspection? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3, Contract `manual-validation.md`]
- [x] CHK020 Are recovery and blocked-validation states represented for missing host prerequisites or unverified Agent model routes? [Coverage, Spec §Assumptions, Contract `manual-validation.md`]
- [x] CHK021 Are profile/tool-permission edge cases covered before no-mutation can be claimed? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Contract `ux-flow.md`]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK022 Are Zed, Agent Panel, model route, and dev-extension prerequisites documented as assumptions rather than hidden implementation requirements? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Quickstart]
- [x] CHK023 Are host-policy boundaries preserved for Docker, Zed prerequisites, and any missing local model/tooling setup? [Dependency, Spec §SC-008, Plan §Target Platform, Quickstart]
- [x] CHK024 Are future publication and registry decisions explicitly deferred to F009? [Dependency, Research, Docs `feature-map.md`]

## Notes

- Complete this checklist before running `speckit-tasks`.
- Mark an item checked only when the requirement is written clearly enough for task generation.
